metadata.title: West Wichita Grand Opening | Bull Attorneys Celebration
metadata.description: Bull Attorneys celebrate their West Wichita office grand opening with community fun, giveaways, and support for local accident victims. See event highlights!

hero.title: Bull Attorneys West Wichita Grand Opening Celebration

content.intro: The Bull Attorneys team invited the Wichita community out to celebrate our expansion to West Wichita.

sections.content: The Bull Attorneys team invited the Wichita community out to celebrate our expansion to West Wichita. We are excited to offer a convenient location for our clients in the West Wichita, Goddard, and Maize areas with our new office. Increasing accessibility to our clients during their time of need is critical for us. We understand how challenging even a visit can be when injured in a truck, car, or motorcycle accident. This is why we offer to send an Uber or Lyft to pick you up and visit hospitals for those injured and unable to drive during their time of need.
The Bull Attorneys West Wichita Grand Opening took place outdoors at 410 W 21st N in Wichita, KS on Sunday April 30th, 2023 from 2:00pm to 5:00pm.

During our celebration we had over 500 people in attendance to come out and visit. We had bouncy houses for the kids, we gave away stuffed Bulls, a Big Screen Television, 16 bicycles for the children and concert tickets. We even had free Mexican Food for all. It was a great time and we thank everyone that came out. Below is a photo gallery of all the fun we had. Thank you Wichita!
You can call to learn more at 316-684-4400, Wichita Truck, Car, and Motorcycle personal injury lawyers.
